embeds.description:
**- To support, uplift, and encourage individuals to create their works.
- To encourage others to collaborate with one another
- To be involved in building connections with others through events and projects.
- To Give help and Take help with respect and without shame.
- To popularize our arts to the common player and introduce new people into the joy of creating VRChat Video Art.
- To make fun the process of creation.
- To create charming works of art.
- To lessen the struggle of completing projects.
- To share passion with one another.
- To become an Identity all are proud to be associated with.**
